footer.tagline: We build the tools. You recommend them. Everyone wins.

hero.title: You create content? We have the perfect tool for your community.
hero.subtitle: We build apps for every topic — education, fitness, nutrition, and more. You share them with your community. And you earn 30 to 50% commission every month. No coding, no investment.

step1.title: Choose your product
step1.description: Browse our catalog and find the app that matches your topic and audience.

step2.title: Share with your community
step2.description: We give you your personal link, visuals, content ideas. Share it your way: video, story, post.

step3.title: Earn your commission every month
step3.description: Every person who subscribes through your link earns you 30 to 50% commission. Every month, as long as they stay subscribed.

ideas.title: Got a product idea for your community?
ideas.subtitle: Tell us what tool is missing for your topic. If the idea is good, we'll build it and you'll be the first to promote it.

item1.title: Recurring revenue
item1.description: No more one-shot sponsored posts. Each subscriber earns you money every month.

item2.title: Zero hassle
item2.description: No inventory, no customer support, no code. We handle everything. You focus on your content.

item3.title: Products that truly help
item3.description: We don't sell hot air. Every app solves a real problem for your community.

item4.title: Full transparency
item4.description: Track your earnings in real-time from your personal dashboard.

cta.title: Ready to monetize your community differently?
cta.subtitle: Join creators who recommend useful tools to their audience and earn a commission every month.

items.a: It depends on your audience size and conversion rate. Use the simulator above to estimate. A creator with 10,000 subscribers and 2% conversion on a €12.90 app with 40% commission earns about €1,000/month.
Yes. You can promote as many apps as you want from the catalog. Each has its own affiliate link.
By bank transfer every month. You receive your commission on all active subscriptions generated through your link.
A simple and transparent partnership agreement. No exclusivity, no time commitment. You can stop whenever you want.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Etudia is me — a passionate developer who believes we can build better products and distribute them differently. No ads, no crazy marketing budgets. Just good tools carried by creators that their community trusts.

manifesto.title: Our belief
manifesto.content: Paid marketing is an arms race. Acquisition costs are skyrocketing, margins are collapsing, and mediocre products survive on ad budgets. We believe in a different model: build excellent products and distribute them through people who have their audience's trust. No ads. No growth hacks. Just great products carried by the right people.

value1.title: Everything's open
value1.description: Your earnings, our numbers, our mistakes. All cards on the table.

value2.title: We move fast
value2.description: A product built in 30 days, not 6 months.

value4.title: Products we maintain
value4.description: Every tool is maintained and improved. We don't abandon anything.

program.title: How We Build a Product
program.description: Our process has been optimized to build a complete and functional application in just 30 days. From market validation to production launch, with our creator partners.

cta.title: Join the adventure
cta.description: Whether you're a creator or have an app idea, there's a place for you at Etudia.
